business.name: Xtreme Landscaping
business.tagline: Your yard's next level starts here

hero.headline: Macon lawns that make *neighbors jealous*
hero.subheadline: Same-day estimates, same-week service. When we say we'll be there, we show up.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything your yard needs
services_section.subheading: From weekly cuts to complete makeovers

services.title: Lawn Mowing & Trimming
services.description: Weekly cuts, edge trimming, and cleanup. Your grass stays healthy and your edges stay sharp.

services.title: Landscape Design
services.description: New plantings, garden beds, and outdoor spaces. We'll make your vision real.

services.title: Yard Cleanup
services.description: Leaf removal, debris clearing, and seasonal prep. Get your yard ready for any season.

services.title: Maintenance Programs
services.description: Regular service schedules that keep your property looking its best year-round.

about.heading: Built for Macon yards
about.body: We're the landscaping team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets your yard handled right.

reviews.name: Cristina A.
reviews.text: Excellent experience with Xtreme Landscaping. Needed lawn service ASAP and he was ready to do the job when he came for the estimate. Very polite, professional and thorough.

reviews.name: Ashley M.
reviews.text: We've used this company for almost a year and are always beyond satisfied! Always polite and does a great job. Support this small business - you won't be disappointed!

reviews.name: Jasmine H.
reviews.text: Always on time, fast, friendly and does an excellent job trimming and cutting. Does random check ups to make sure my yard looks good. Never had a complaint.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Macon and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local landscaping team covering Middle Georgia

cta.heading: Ready for a yard that stands out?
cta.body: Free estimates, honest pricing, and service that shows up when promised. Let's talk about your project.
